hero.cassiaEyebrow: F1 Hybrid Seeds · Nationwide Supply · Pakistan
hero.cassiaSub: Empowering farmers with high-yield F1 hybrid varieties. Grown in Pakistan, trusted nationwide.
hero.cassiaUrSub: اعلیٰ پیداوار والی ایف ون ہائبرڈ اقسام کے ساتھ کسانوں کو بااختیار بنانا۔
hero.malapineEyebrow: Export Quality Seeds · F1 Hybrid · Worldwide
hero.malapineSub: Hand-selected F1 hybrid varieties packaged for export. Premium yield, premium pricing.
hero.malapineUrSub: ہاتھ سے منتخب ایف ون ہائبرڈ اقسام، ایکسپورٹ کے لیے تیار۔

about.cassiaBody: Cassia Seed Pvt. Ltd brings Pakistan's farmers the highest-quality F1 hybrid seed varieties. Based in Multan, we supply nationwide with farmer support at every step.
about.cassiaUrBody: اعلیٰ پیداوار والی ہائبرڈ بیج اقسام، پاکستان بھر میں دستیاب۔
about.malapineBody: MalaPine Seeds produces hand-selected, export-grade F1 hybrid varieties. Each lot is QC'd for purity, germination, and visual uniformity before packaging.
about.malapineUrBody: ایکسپورٹ معیار کے ایف ون ہائبرڈ بیج، عالمی منڈی کے لیے۔
about.visionBody: To be Pakistan's preferred partner in agricultural seed innovation.
about.missionBody: Empower farmers and communities through high-quality seed solutions.

features.sub: Four reasons growers and buyers come back to us, season after season.

youtube.sub: Watch farmer testimonials and product demonstrations from across Pakistan.

whatsapp.bannerSub: Talk to our agronomist, place your order, get delivery anywhere in Pakistan.

footer.cassiaTagline: F1 hybrid vegetable seeds. Multan, Pakistan. Nationwide supply, farmer support included.
footer.malapineTagline: Export-quality F1 hybrid seeds. Shipping worldwide from Multan, Pakistan.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Cassia Seed Pvt. Ltd. All rights reserved.

contact.pageSubtitle: We're based in Multan — reach us on WhatsApp, email, or visit us directly.

about_page.visionBody: To be the preferred partners in agriculture, driving growth through innovation, sustainability, and excellence, while creating enduring value for farmers, communities, and stakeholders.
about_page.missionBody: Empowering farmers and communities through high-quality seed solutions and sustainable agricultural growth.
about_page.storyBody: Founded in Multan — Pakistan's agricultural heartland — Cassia Seed Pvt. Ltd was built on a simple promise: bring the best F1 hybrid seed varieties to every farmer in Pakistan, backed by agronomist support at every step.

plantiva.label: A new chapter
plantiva.body: A new venture from the team behind Cassia Seed Pvt. Ltd — focused on the next generation of crop science. We're building something that grows beyond seeds. Sign up to be first when we launch.
plantiva.notifyNote: We'll only email you once — at launch.
plantiva.footerCopy: © 2026 Plantiva · A Cassia Seed Pvt. Ltd venture
